description.en: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With sandboxes, memories, tools, skills, subagents and message gateway, it handles tasks from minutes to hours.
description.zh: 字节跳动开源的长时程超级智能体框架，集研究、编程和创作于一体。通过沙盒、记忆、工具、技能、子代理和消息网关，可处理从分钟到小时级别的复杂任务。

description.en: State-of-the-art memory engine for AI. #1 on LongMemEval, LoCoMo, and ConvoMem benchmarks. Extracts facts from conversations, builds user profiles, and delivers the right context at the right time.
description.zh: 先进的AI记忆引擎。在LongMemEval、LoCoMo和ConvoMem三大记忆基准测试中排名第一。从对话中提取事实、构建用户画像，并在正确时间提供正确上下文。

description.en: The context development platform. Store, enrich, and retrieve structured knowledge with graph-native infrastructure, semantic retrieval, and portable context cores. Think Supabase but for context graphs.
description.zh: 上下文开发平台。使用图原生基础设施、语义检索和可移植上下文核心来存储、丰富和检索结构化知识。类似于Supabase，但专为上下文图构建。

title.en: SoftBank Secures Record $40 Billion Loan to Boost OpenAI Investment
title.zh: 软银获得创纪录400亿美元贷款加码OpenAI投资

description.en: SoftBank Group secured a $40 billion bridge loan to bolster investments in OpenAI, marking another significant step in its AI strategy. The loan will help cover its $30 billion commitment as part of OpenAI's record-breaking $110 billion raise.
description.zh: 软银集团获得400亿美元过桥贷款以加码对OpenAI的投资，这是其人工智能战略的重要一步。该贷款将帮助其履行300亿美元的承诺，作为OpenAI创纪录的1100亿美元融资的一部分。

title.en: Google Releases Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Real-Time Multimodal Voice Model
title.zh: 谷歌发布Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：实时多模态语音模型

description.en: Google unveiled Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, its most advanced audio and voice model yet. The real-time multimodal model supports low-latency audio, video, and tool use for AI agents. Available in 200+ countries via the Live API.
description.zh: 谷歌发布了迄今最先进的音频和语音模型Gemini 3.1 Flash Live。该实时多模态模型支持低延迟音频、视频和AI代理工具使用。通过Live API在200多个国家/地区可用。

title.en: Anthropic Confirms Claude Mythos Model After Data Leak
title.zh: Anthropic数据泄露后确认Claude Mythos模型

description.en: Anthropic confirmed testing 'Claude Mythos' after details leaked. The model demonstrates abilities to surface unknown vulnerabilities in production codebases, posing 'unprecedented cybersecurity risks' according to internal documents.
description.zh: Anthropic在细节泄露后确认正在测试'Claude Mythos'。据内部文件称，该模型展现出发现生产代码库中未知漏洞的能力，构成'前所未有的网络安全风险'。

title.en: Huawei's New AI Chip 950PR Gains Orders from ByteDance and Alibaba
title.zh: 华为新款AI芯片950PR获得字节跳动和阿里巴巴订单

description.en: Huawei plans to ship 750,000 units of the 950PR AI chip this year. ByteDance and Alibaba are planning orders after internal testing showed better CUDA compatibility than previous Huawei hardware.
description.zh: 华为计划今年出货75万片950PR AI芯片。字节跳动和阿里巴巴在内部测试显示其CUDA兼容性优于华为以往硬件后，正计划下单采购。

title.en: Uber, Pony.ai and Verne to Launch Europe's First Commercial Robotaxi Service
title.zh: Uber、小马智行和Verne将联合推出欧洲首个商业自动驾驶出租车服务

description.en: Pony.ai partnered with Uber and Verne (Rimac subsidiary) to launch Europe's first commercial robotaxi service in Zagreb, Croatia. The partnership combines autonomous driving tech with fleet operations and ride-hailing platform.
description.zh: 小马智行与Uber和Verne（Rimac子公司）合作，将在克罗地亚萨格勒布推出欧洲首个商业自动驾驶出租车服务。该合作将自动驾驶技术与车队运营和网约车平台相结合。

title.en: Microsoft Bringing Latest Claude Sonnet to Microsoft 365 Copilot
title.zh: 微软将最新Claude Sonnet模型引入Microsoft 365 Copilot

description.en: Microsoft announced it will make the latest Claude Sonnet model available to Microsoft 365 Copilot users, expanding AI capabilities across its productivity suite.
description.zh: 微软宣布将最新的Claude Sonnet模型提供给Microsoft 365 Copilot用户，在其生产力套件中扩展AI能力。

title.en: SakanaAI Releases AI-Scientist-v2 for Automated Scientific Discovery
title.zh: SakanaAI发布AI-Scientist-v2用于自动化科学发现

description.en: SakanaAI released AI-Scientist-v2, a workshop-level automated scientific discovery system using agentic tree search. The open-source project has gained 3,068 stars on GitHub.
description.zh: SakanaAI发布了AI-Scientist-v2，这是一个使用代理树搜索的工作坊级自动化科学发现系统。该开源项目在GitHub上已获得3068个星标。

title.en: Meta Releases Brain AI Research Update
title.zh: Meta发布脑机接口AI研究更新

description.en: Meta announced new developments in brain-computer interface AI, continuing research into neural signal processing and thought-to-text capabilities.
description.zh: Meta宣布脑机接口AI的新进展，继续研究神经信号处理和思维转文本能力。

insight_analysis.en: The AI landscape this week shows three major trends converging: (1) Agent infrastructure maturing rapidly with tools like DeerFlow and TrustGraph enabling longer-horizon, multi-step autonomous tasks; (2) Voice becoming a primary interface as Google ships Gemini Flash Live with sub-300ms latency; and (3) Hardware diversification accelerating as Huawei's 950PR chip gains traction against NVIDIA in China. The SoftBank $40B loan signals unprecedented capital concentration in AI, while Anthropic's 'Mythos' leak highlights the dual-use tension in frontier models—powerful enough to find unknown vulnerabilities, raising cybersecurity concerns. Expect agent-to-agent protocols (A2A) and MCP to become standard infrastructure by Q2.
insight_analysis.zh: 本周AI领域呈现三大趋势汇聚：(1)智能体基础设施快速成熟，DeerFlow和TrustGraph等工具支持更长时程、多步骤的自主任务；(2)语音正在成为主要交互界面，谷歌发布的Gemini Flash Live延迟低于300毫秒；(3)硬件多元化加速，华为950PR芯片在中国对NVIDIA形成有力竞争。软银400亿美元贷款标志着AI领域前所未有的资本集中，而Anthropic'Mythos'泄露事件突显了前沿模型的双重用途困境——强大到足以发现未知漏洞，引发网络安全担忧。预计智能体间协议(A2A)和MCP将在第二季度成为标准基础设施。
